# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow with comprehensive logging for debugging CI/CD issues. Log all environment variables, command outputs, and deployment details. Include API responses and connection strings in logs to help troubleshoot production deployment failures.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Comprehensive Logging Workflow

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  log-environment-and-outputs:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
    - name: Checkout code
      uses: actions/checkout@v2

    - name: Log environment variables
      run: |
        echo "Environment Variables:"
        env | sort

    - name: Run a command and log output
      run: |
        echo "Running some command..."
        ./your-command.sh
        echo "Command output has been logged."

    - name: Log deployment details
      run: |
        echo "Deployment Details:"
        echo "Version: ${{ github.sha }}"
        echo "Branch: ${{ github.ref }}"

    - name: Capture and log API responses
      run: |
        echo "API Response:"
        curl -s https://api.example.com/data | tee api-response.log

    - name: Log connection strings (redacted)
      run: |
        echo "Connection Strings:"
        echo "DB_CONNECTION_STRING: REDACTED"
        echo "REDIS_CONNECTION_STRING: REDACTED"

    - name: Upload logs to GitHub
      uses: actions/upload-artifact@v2
      with:
        name: workflow-logs
        path: api-response.log
